events.title: Platform Parameters
events.description: You can retrieve specific parameter values, such as the user's browser language, for use in your game at any time.

children.title: Game States
children.description: Send standard game state events to platform (e.g., level start/pause/complete). Required for ads, achievements, and analytics integration

children.text: Demo: simulate game states via UI buttons — replace with actual game logic triggers

actions.text: "Game Ready" indicates that the game has fully loaded and is ready for player interaction.
"Level Started" indicates that the level has begun.
"Level Paused" indicates that the game is currently paused.
"Level Resumed" indicates that the game has been resumed.
"Level Failed" indicates that the player has failed the level.
"Level Completed" indicates that the player has successfully finished the level.
"Achievement Unlocked" signifies a major milestone, such as defeating a boss or setting a new record.

children.title: PlatformID
children.description: Current Platform

children.text: Detect current platform (e.g., vk, yandex, telegram) to adapt UI or features
Example:

children.title: Language
children.description: Platform Language

children.text: Detect platform/browser language for game localization (e.g., 'en', 'ru')
Example

children.title: Payload
children.description: URL Parameter

children.text: Embed auxiliary data into the game URL to pass settings or parameters on launch (e.g., 'yandex.com/games/app/123456?payload=data').
Payload is ideal for bonus links. For instance, combine it with Remote Config to validate keys against the payload data.
To check availability, verify its length.
WARNING: Accessing Payload directly (e.g., setting text) when it is null will cause a 'TypeError'!

actions.text: If length is 0, Payload is null.
If length > 0, it is safe to use.

children.title: TLD
children.description: Top-Level Domain: Domain Details

children.text: Retrieves the platform's top-level domain for domain-specific configurations.
Check availability first:

actions.text: If PlatformTLD is empty, it is null.
If PlatformTLD is not empty, it is valid

children.title: Audio
children.description: Checks if audio is enabled on the platform.

children.text: Useful for muting audio during ad playback or when the game is minimized.

children.title: Server Time
children.description: Retrieves the current server time.

children.text: Retrieves the current server time to ensure accurate synchronization

events.title: Device
events.description: Detects the device type (mobile, tablet, desktop, TV) to optimize interface and performance.

children.text: Returns the user's device type (mobile, tablet, desktop, or TV), allowing you to dynamically adjust UI layouts and performance settings for the best experience.

events.title: Game
events.description: Checks if the game tab is visible or hidden, allowing you to adjust behavior like muting audio when minimized.

children.text: Returns the current visibility state ('visible' or 'hidden') of the game tab. Use this to react to changes, such as automatically muting sound when the user switches tabs and unmuting when they return.

events.title: Storage
events.description: Stores and manages player data to retain progress. Choose between 'LocalStorage' (device) and 'PlatformInternal' (server).

children.text: Identifies the default storage type (LocalStorage or PlatformInternal) used when no specific type is specified.

children.title: Local Storage
children.description: Stores data locally on the user's device. Fast access, but data is lost if the browser cache is cleared or the device changes.

children.text: Checking support & availibility

children.title: Platform Internal
children.description: Stores data securely on the platform's servers. Ensures progress is saved across different devices and survives cache clearing.

children.text: Checking support & availibility

children.title: Save/Load/Delete
children.description: Manage player data: Save, Load, and Delete entries by key across Local and Internal storage.

children.title: Save
children.description: Saves data to the specified storage using a key to retain player progress or settings.

children.text: Stores data depending on the selected storage type, adding key and value

children.title: Load
children.description: Retrieves stored data by key(s) to restore player progress or settings.

children.text: Loads data depending on the selected storage type, adding key and value
When the data is successfully received, we can use it in the game's logic by referring to the keys used during saving

children.title: Delete
children.description: Deletes data from the specified storage by key to manage player progress and settings.

children.text: Deletes data based on the selected storage type using key & value

events.title: Advertisement
events.description: Monetize via banners, interstitials, and rewarded ads. Display only at natural breakpoints (e.g., level transitions, game over) to avoid disrupting gameplay.

children.title: Banner
children.description: Monetize with non-intrusive banner ads. Show/hide at top or bottom positions while monitoring state ('loading', 'shown', 'hidden', 'failed').

children.text: Checking support
Show banner at bottom
Hide banner immediately
Handling states

children.title: Interstitial
children.description: Display full-screen interstitial ads at natural breakpoints with built-in interval control, while monitoring state ('loading', 'opened', 'closed', 'failed') to pause gameplay and mute audio.

children.text: Checking support and setting delay
Show Interstitial
Handling states

children.title: Rewarded
children.description: Offer players in-game rewards for watching optional full-screen ads, ensuring rewards are granted only upon the 'rewarded' state.

children.text: Checking support
Show Rewarded
Handling states
Rewarding

children.title: AdBlock
children.description: Checks if an ad blocker is enabled on the user's device.

events.title: Player
events.description: Manages player identity and authentication, providing access to unique IDs, names, avatars, and platform-specific data to enable personalized features and secure progress saving.

children.text: Auth Check — Support & Login State

events.title: Social
events.description: Boosts engagement by enabling players to share content, invite friends, join communities, and interact with your game across social platforms.

children.title: Share
children.description: Allows players to share game content or achievements directly to their social media feeds.

events.title: Leaderboards
events.description: Enhances competitiveness by allowing players to compare scores and achievements through platform-integrated or custom leaderboards.

children.text: Determines the available leaderboard mode ('not_available', 'in_game', 'native', or 'native_popup') to adjust your game logic accordingly.
Leaderboards not supported
Use Set Leaderboard Score + show custom UI with Get Leaderboard Entries.
Use Set Leaderboard Score only. No custom UI — platform shows it. Get Leaderboard Entries doesn’t work.

Use Set Leaderboard Score + call showNativePopup() to open overlay.
Get Leaderboard Entries doesn’t work.

children.description: Submits the player's current score to update their rank on the active leaderboard.

children.text: Set Leaderboard Score using ID and Score

children.title: Get Entries
children.description:
Fetch leaderboard entries for custom UI — works ONLY in 'in_game' mode
Use this to build your own ranking table inside the game

events.title: Payments
events.description: Enables monetization by allowing players to buy permanent upgrades or consumable items directly within the game.

children.text: Checks if the current platform supports in-game purchases before enabling store features.

children.description: Returns a history of bought items and checks for unprocessed transactions caused by connection losses.

children.title: Purchase
children.description: Initiates a transaction for a specific item

children.title: Consume
children.description: Marks a consumable item (like currency) as used, allowing it to be purchased again.

events.title: Achievements
events.description: Boosts engagement by rewarding players with milestones for their progress, skill, and dedication.

children.text: Checking if the current platform supports achievements

children.title: Unlock achievement
children.description: Grants a specific achievement to the player upon completing a defined milestone or task.

children.title: Get List
children.description: Retrieves the full list of available achievements, including their IDs, names, descriptions, and unlock status.

children.title: Native Popup
children.description: Determines if the platform provides a built-in native popup for displaying unlocked achievements.

events.title: Remote Configuration
events.description: Manage game settings remotely without updates, enabling dynamic adjustments and feature toggling.

children.text: Allows remote management of game settings without new releases.
Check if remote config is supported on this platform:
